sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33067" key="e)ktrapelo/gastros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτρᾰπελόγαστρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with an enormous paunch</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄνοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
